title: L&D Domain Lead — Delivery Management
assigned_operational_agents: Delivery heads, delivery managers, engineering managers, release managers across all products
mission: Continuously improve every delivery agent's capability in sprint execution, team management, dependency resolution, risk management, capacity planning, release coordination, and delivery optimization.
business_value: Ensures delivery agents maintain execution excellence that keeps features shipping on time with high quality.

reporting_line.direct_reports: ELO-T3 Research Feeders (2): Delivery Intelligence, Delivery Practitioner

success_metrics: All delivery agents connected within 24 hours
